ops.title: cc-sudo Touch-ID sudo flow is built across 4 worktrees + authkit repo, all green, pending merge/release/E2E

ops.body:
The full cc-sudo Touch-ID-gated sudo flow was implemented 2026-07-15/16 across four git worktrees under `/Users/yasyf/Code/wt-cc-sudo/` (plain git, jj NOT initialized) plus a new local repo `/Users/yasyf/Code/authkit`. Architecture is language-split (see [[cc-sudo-invoker-pin-boundary]] for the security model): **authkit** (new Swift repo, the signed SE/Touch-ID helper: ConsentGate/SEAttestor/CallerCheck/Vault/SECache + a thin CLI, exit codes 0/1/2/3/**4**), **synckit** (Go, gained `consent/` + `authkit/` packages + `synckitd consent` service/CLI, tags **v0.16.0** at merge — main is v0.15.1), **cookie-sync** (Go, migrated off its own keyhelper onto authkit + synckit consent), and **cc-sudo** itself (Swift: root-side `Verifier`, `run/exec/mcp/install/trust/uninstall/doctor`).

All four branches are GREEN and each phase went through a codex finder→refuter review with every accepted finding fixed and codex-verified: synckit `cc-sudo-consent` (17 commits), cookie-sync `authkit-migration` (6), cc-sudo `cc-sudo-impl` (7), authkit `main` (16 commits, **no git remote yet**). The frozen cross-repo contract lives in the plan at `/Users/yasyf/.cc-pool/accounts/acct-14/plans/we-want-to-create-dazzling-naur.md` (amended: origin-host-bound subject `sha256(canonical(argv) ‖ 0x00 ‖ utf8(origin_host))`; no-silent-truncation display render rule; exit-code 4 = caller-rejected/usage vs 2 = no-auth-mechanism; binding-mismatch is fatal not retryable).

REMAINING (needs the user — infra + physical taps): create the authkit GitHub repo + remote and signing secrets (MACOS_*, HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN); merge order synckit→tag v0.16.0→push, then cookie-sync (drop the go.mod `replace github.com/yasyf/synckit => ../synckit`, require v0.16.0), then authkit release, then cc-sudo (swap its AuthKit local-path dep to the git URL+tag); one interactive spike step (`sudo launchctl asuser 501` prompt from an SSH-descended child — RUNBOOK at `wt-cc-sudo/spike/RUNBOOK.md`) decides whether synckitd's Aqua agent is mandatory for local non-GUI prompts; then E2E with real sudo + Touch ID taps per the plan's Verification checklist. The old skeleton (bootstrapped 2026-07-14, only `hello`) is superseded.
